top_sources.top_context: Thymalin, KPV. Larazotide too. LL-37 is okay but can sometimes backfire in autoimmune cases, so wait until you're more cleaned up. Allergies and asthma Thymosin Alpha-1 first. VIP is great here, especially for asthma since it helps the lungs. You can also try lung bioregulators like Bronchogen or Chonluten. When TRT and peptides are a bad idea If you're trying to get pregnant with your wife in the next two years, TRT might not be the best move right away. reset_biology_synthesis.recommendation: Reset Biology suggests asking the practitioner to consider Hunter Williams's dated, verbatim library-video statements: Hunter Williams — peptide-qa-july-2025--936e4b81 (2026-03-29, 35:31, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/peptide-qa-july-2025--936e4b81/): "bronchogen and conlutin, can they be used together to heal chronic lung conditions? Absolutely. I would do two milligrams of both per day." Hunter Williams — peptide-qa-january-2026--7994649b (2026-03-30, 14:29, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/peptide-qa-january-2026--7994649b/): "You can also try one of the lung bioregulators, bronchogen or chonlutin, chondluten would the other one. if you wanted to introduce those."
